title: BBA International Accounting and Finance
content: The BBA -International Accounting & Finance with ACCA program at Galgotias University is an industry-aligned undergraduate course designed to provide a dual advantage: an academic degree in Business Administration and a globally recognized professional qualification from ACCA (Association of Chartered Certified Accountants), UK. Offered in collaboration with Zell Education, a premier ACCA learning partner, this program ensures that students receive focused training and support for completing the ACCA qualification alongside their graduation. The program structure includes 13 ACCA papers, out of which 9 papers are exempted through an integrated curriculum, while students need to clear the remaining 4 professional-level ACCA papers independently with the assistance of expert coaching by Zell Education. Upon clearing all non-exempted papers, students become ACCA Affiliates, and with 3 years of relevant work experience, they can apply for full ACCA membership. This unique integration equips students with global perspectives in Accounting and Finance and opens up international career opportunities in domains like Audit, Taxation, Financial Management, and Corporate Finance. The curriculum includes core subjects such as International Financial Reporting, Strategic Business Leadership, Performance Management, Auditing, and Financial Strategy. In addition to this, students are trained in soft skills, practical applications, and are supported with study materials, exam registration guidance, and career mentoring. XII with minimum 50% marks in Aggregate Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list 01 Apply advanced knowledge of international accounting and financial principles to solve complex business problems and formulate data-driven financial strategies. 02 Evaluate and implement global financial reporting frameworks, including IFRS and ACCA standards, for accurate corporate disclosures and regulatory compliance. 03 Analyze financial and business information critically to support strategic decision-making, risk assessment, and performance evaluation in a dynamic global environment. 04 Design innovative financial systems and processes that align with global best practices, while addressing organizational, societal, and environmental needs. 05 Integrate modern data analytics tools, enterprise resource planning (ERP) systems, and financial technologies (FinTech) to improve decision-making and business intelligence. 06 Demonstrate leadership and teamwork skills by managing multidisciplinary financial projects, showing initiative and accountability in professional roles. 07 Uphold ethical standards and professional conduct in financial practices while addressing corporate governance, sustainability, and social responsibility. 08 Communicate effectively and persuasively in global financial settings using analytical insights, digital tools, and professional reporting formats. 01 Graduates will be adaptable to change and demonstrate flexibility in navigating dynamic global business environments, responding effectively to evolving global industry trends and technological advancements in professional and academic courses related to business, accounting, and finance. 02 Graduates will possess the required techniques, skills, and knowledge to attain technical expertise in accounting, financial analysis, business administration, and international finance, tailored to the contemporary global corporate landscape. 03 Graduates will contribute positively to society by applying their business and financial acumen to address societal challenges, promote sustainable practices, ensure ethical standards, and create value for stakeholders through responsible leadership. 01 Graduates will be proficient in accounting principles and practices, including the preparation and interpretation of financial statements, compliance with international financial reporting standards, and the use of accounting software and tools. 02 Attain globally recognized professional qualifications in International Accounting and Finance by integrating the ACCA curriculum, and demonstrate strategic decision-making skills in areas such as financial management, risk assessment, and organizational strategy. 03 Graduates will demonstrate entrepreneurial thinking and innovation, with the ability to identify business opportunities, develop business plans, and manage and grow entrepreneurial ventures in domestic and international markets.
